lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕਸੁ ਚਰਣੀ ਜੇ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਵਹਿ ਲਬਿ ਲੋਭਿ ਕੀ ਧਾਵਸਿਤਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: ekas charanee je chit laaveh lab lobh kee dhaavasitaa |3|
lines.english: If you focus your consciousness on the Feet of the One Lord, what reason would you have to chase after greed? ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪਸਿ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਰਚਸਿ ਮਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: japas niranjan rachas manaa |
lines.english: Meditate on the Immaculate Lord, and saturate your mind with Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਕਮਲੀ ਹੰਸੁ ਇਆਣਾ ਮੇਰੀ ਮੇਰੀ ਕਰਤ ਬਿਹਾਣੀਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa kamalee hans eaanaa meree meree karat bihaaneetaa |
lines.english: The body is wild, and the mind is foolish. Practicing egotism, selfishness and conceit, your life is passing away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਹੇ ਬੋਲਹਿ ਜੋਗੀ ਕਪਟੁ ਘਨਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kaahe boleh jogee kapatt ghanaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Why, O Yogi, do you make so many false and deceptive claims? ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਚੇਤੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree chetee mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Gauree Chaytee, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਉਖਧ ਮੰਤ੍ਰ ਮੂਲੁ ਮਨ ਏਕੈ ਜੇ ਕਰਿ ਦ੍ਰਿੜੁ ਚਿਤੁ ਕੀਜੈ ਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: aaukhadh mantr mool man ekai je kar drirr chit keejai re |
lines.english: O mind, there is only the One medicine, mantra and healing herb - center your consciousness firmly on the One Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਣਵਤਿ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਨਾਗੀ ਦਾਝੈ ਫਿਰਿ ਪਾਛੈ ਪਛੁਤਾਣੀਤਾ ॥੪॥੩॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: pranavat naanak naagee daajhai fir paachhai pachhutaaneetaa |4|3|15|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, when the naked body is cremated, then you will come to regret and repent. ||4||3||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਕੇ ਪਾਪ ਕਰਮ ਕੇ ਕਾਟਨਹਾਰਾ ਲੀਜੈ ਰੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: janam janam ke paap karam ke kaattanahaaraa leejai re |1|
lines.english: Take to the Lord, the Destroyer of the sins and karma of past incarnations. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਏਕੋ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਭਾਈ ਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: man eko saahib bhaaee re |
lines.english: The One Lord and Master is pleasing to my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੇ ਤੀਨਿ ਗੁਣਾ ਸੰਸਾਰਿ ਸਮਾਵਹਿ ਅਲਖੁ ਨ ਲਖਣਾ ਜਾਈ ਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tere teen gunaa sansaar samaaveh alakh na lakhanaa jaaee re |1| rahaau |
lines.english: In Your three qualities, the world is engrossed; the Unknowable cannot be known. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਤਿ ਅਨੇਰੀ ਸੂਝਸਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਲਜੁ ਟੂਕਸਿ ਮੂਸਾ ਭਾਈ ਰੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: raat aneree soojhas naahee laj ttookas moosaa bhaaee re |2|
lines.english: In the dark of the night, nothing can be seen. The mouse of death is gnawing away at the rope of life, O Siblings of Destiny! ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਕਰ ਖੰਡੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਤਨਿ ਮੀਠੀ ਹਮ ਤਉ ਪੰਡ ਉਚਾਈ ਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: sakar khandd maaeaa tan meetthee ham tau pandd uchaaee re |
lines.english: Maya is so sweet to the body, like sugar or molasses. We all carry loads of it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਤੇਤਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਲਾਗੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਵਡਾਈ ਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh kareh tetaa dukh laagai guramukh milai vaddaaee re |
lines.english: As the self-willed manmukhs act, they suffer in pain. The Gurmukh obtains honor and greatness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤਿਨਿ ਕੀਆ ਸੋਈ ਹੋਆ ਕਿਰਤੁ ਨ ਮੇਟਿਆ ਜਾਈ ਰੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jo tin keea soee hoaa kirat na mettiaa jaaee re |3|
lines.english: Whatever He does, that alone happens; past actions cannot be erased. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਭਰ ਭਰੇ ਨ ਹੋਵਹਿ ਊਣੇ ਜੋ ਰਾਤੇ ਰੰਗੁ ਲਾਈ ਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: subhar bhare na hoveh aoone jo raate rang laaee re |
lines.english: Those who are imbued with, and committed to the Lord's Love, are filled to overflowing; they never lack anything.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਪੰਕ ਹੋਵੈ ਜੇ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਤਉ ਮੂੜਾ ਕਿਛੁ ਪਾਈ ਰੇ ॥੪॥੪॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: tin kee pank hovai je naanak tau moorraa kichh paaee re |4|4|16|
lines.english: If Nanak could be the dust of their feet, then he, the ignorant one, might also obtain some. ||4||4||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਚੇਤੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree chetee mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Gauree Chaytee, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਤ ਕੀ ਮਾਈ ਬਾਪੁ ਕਤ ਕੇਰਾ ਕਿਦੂ ਥਾਵਹੁ ਹਮ ਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: kat kee maaee baap kat keraa kidoo thaavahu ham aae |
lines.english: Who is our mother, and who is our father? Where did we come from?

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਨਿ ਬਿੰਬ ਜਲ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਨਿਪਜੇ ਕਾਹੇ ਕੰਮਿ ਉਪਾਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: agan binb jal bheetar nipaje kaahe kam upaae |1|
lines.english: We are formed from the fire of the womb within, and the bubble of water of the sperm. For what purpose are we created? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਸਾਹਿਬਾ ਕਉਣੁ ਜਾਣੈ ਗੁਣ ਤੇਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: mere saahibaa kaun jaanai gun tere |
lines.english: O my Master, who can know Your Glorious Virtues?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੇਤੇ ਰੁਖ ਬਿਰਖ ਹਮ ਚੀਨੇ ਕੇਤੇ ਪਸੂ ਉਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: kete rukh birakh ham cheene kete pasoo upaae |
lines.english: I took the form of so many plants and trees, and so many animals.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੇਤੇ ਨਾਗ ਕੁਲੀ ਮਹਿ ਆਏ ਕੇਤੇ ਪੰਖ ਉਡਾਏ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kete naag kulee meh aae kete pankh uddaae |2|
lines.english: Many times I entered the families of snakes and flying birds. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੇ ਨ ਜਾਨੀ ਅਉਗਣ ਮੇਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kahe na jaanee aaugan mere |1| rahaau |
lines.english: My own demerits cannot be counted. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਟ ਪਟਣ ਬਿਜ ਮੰਦਰ ਭੰਨੈ ਕਰਿ ਚੋਰੀ ਘਰਿ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: hatt pattan bij mandar bhanai kar choree ghar aavai |
lines.english: I broke into the shops of the city and well-guarded palaces; stealing from them, I snuck home again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਹੁ ਦੇਖੈ ਪਿਛਹੁ ਦੇਖੈ ਤੁਝ ਤੇ ਕਹਾ ਛਪਾਵੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: agahu dekhai pichhahu dekhai tujh te kahaa chhapaavai |3|
lines.english: I looked in front of me, and I looked behind me, but where could I hide from You? ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਟ ਤੀਰਥ ਹਮ ਨਵ ਖੰਡ ਦੇਖੇ ਹਟ ਪਟਣ ਬਾਜਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: tatt teerath ham nav khandd dekhe hatt pattan baajaaraa |
lines.english: I saw the banks of sacred rivers, the nine continents, the shops and bazaars of the cities.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੈ ਕੈ ਤਕੜੀ ਤੋਲਣਿ ਲਾਗਾ ਘਟ ਹੀ ਮਹਿ ਵਣਜਾਰਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: lai kai takarree tolan laagaa ghatt hee meh vanajaaraa |4|
lines.english: Taking the scale, the merchant begins to weigh his actions within his own heart. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਤਾ ਸਮੁੰਦੁ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਨੀਰਿ ਭਰਿਆ ਤੇਤੇ ਅਉਗਣ ਹਮਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: jetaa samund saagar neer bhariaa tete aaugan hamaare |
lines.english: As the seas and the oceans are overflowing with water, so vast are my own sins.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅੜਾ ਅਗਨਿ ਬਰਾਬਰਿ ਤਪੈ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਵਗੈ ਕਾਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: jeearraa agan baraabar tapai bheetar vagai kaatee |
lines.english: My soul is burning like fire, and the knife is cutting deep.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਇਆ ਕਰਹੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਮਿਹਰ ਉਪਾਵਹੁ ਡੁਬਦੇ ਪਥਰ ਤਾਰੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: deaa karahu kichh mihar upaavahu ddubade pathar taare |5|
lines.english: Please, shower me with Your Mercy, and take pity upon me. I am a sinking stone - please carry me across! ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਬੈਰਾਗਣਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree bairaagan mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Gauree Bairaagan, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਣਵਤਿ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ॥੬॥੫॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: pranavat naanak hukam pachhaanai sukh hovai din raatee |6|5|17|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, recognizing the Lord's Command, I am at peace, day and night. ||6||5||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੈਣਿ ਗਵਾਈ ਸੋਇ ਕੈ ਦਿਵਸੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: rain gavaaee soe kai divas gavaaeaa khaae |
lines.english: The nights are wasted sleeping, and the days are wasted eating.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੀਰੇ ਜੈਸਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਹੈ ਕਉਡੀ ਬਦਲੇ ਜਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: heere jaisaa janam hai kauddee badale jaae |1|
lines.english: Human life is such a precious jewel, but it is being lost in exchange for a mere shell. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਜਾਨਿਆ ਰਾਮ ਕਾ ॥
lines.translit: naam na jaaniaa raam kaa |
lines.english: You do not know the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਤਾ ਧਨੁ ਧਰਣੀ ਧਰੇ ਅਨਤ ਨ ਚਾਹਿਆ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: anataa dhan dharanee dhare anat na chaahiaa jaae |
lines.english: You bury your temporary wealth in the ground, but how can you love that which is temporary?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੂੜੇ ਫਿਰਿ ਪਾਛੈ ਪਛੁਤਾਹਿ ਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: moorre fir paachhai pachhutaeh re |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You fool - you shall regret and repent in the end! ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣ ਲੀਆ ਜੇ ਮਿਲੈ ਤਾ ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਭਾਗਠੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: aapan leea je milai taa sabh ko bhaagatth hoe |
lines.english: If people could gather it in by their own efforts, then everyone would be so lucky.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਤ ਕਉ ਚਾਹਨ ਜੋ ਗਏ ਸੇ ਆਏ ਅਨਤ ਗਵਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: anat kau chaahan jo ge se aae anat gavaae |2|
lines.english: Those who have departed, after craving for temporary wealth, have returned home without this temporary wealth. ||2||
